results.title: International Monetary Fund | April 2026: Global Economy Tested Again
10 Charts To Address Concerns On 2026 Geopolitical Conflict
Stock Market Outlook 2026: Political Risks Loom
Equities hit records as geopolitical risks linger
War Darkens Global Economic Outlook and Reshapes Policy Priorities

summary: Middle East conflict threatening Strait of Hormuz closure driving oil price spikes (+19% forecast). US tariffs, Iran civil unrest, NATO posture in Greenland, Venezuela tensions add layers of uncertainty. IMF adverse scenario: global growth 2.5%, inflation 5.4%. Iran peace proposal on May 1 helped boost equities.
